name: @proveit/open-verifier-repo
description: Public workspace for ProveIT verification contracts and verifier tooling.

scripts.typecheck: npm run build --workspace @proveit/verification-contract && npm run typecheck --workspaces
scripts.test: npm run build --workspaces && npm run test --workspaces --if-present
scripts.verify: npm run typecheck && npm test && npm run check:boundary && npm run check:secrets
